title: palala pendulina
intro: Palala pendulina, also known as the African star apple, is a plant species native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Palala pendulina include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antimicrobial agent to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal benefits.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", palala pendulina (part of Prasachandaeng remedy) has antipyretic properties, as the 95% ethanolic extract of PSD remedy exhibited the highest inhibitory activities on the production of NO and PGE2, indicating its potential to reduce fever.
